provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Inquests (Establishment of Coroners' Courts) Order, and shall come into operation on the first day of July.

provisions.title: District Coroner's Court
provisions.content: There is hereby established in respect of each district in which there is established a district council one Coroner's Court which shall be known as the Coroner's Court for each such district.

provisions.title: Municipal Coroner's Court
provisions.content: There is hereby established in respect of each urban area in which there is established a municipal council or a city council one Coroner's Court which shall be known as the Coroner's Court for each such municipality or, as the case may be, such city.

provisions.title: Exercise of functions
provisions.content: Each Coroner's Court established by this Order shall exercise its functions in accordance with the provisions of the Inquests Act 1 . 1 Cap. 24 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation 01 July 1984 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
